_comment: Endpoint registry for the CI guard in apps/api/internal/http/coverage_test.go. Every /v1/* route in the chi router MUST have an entry here. Missing entries fail CI. See docs/test-strategy.md §4.1 TR-3.

endpoints.rbac_test: n/a — unauthenticated test-only endpoint; removed before first Design Partner onboard (Sprint 11)
endpoints.notes: ADR-009 §1.1 Week-2 Go-ramp checkpoint. Returns workspace context from middleware + sqlc-generated list of all workspaces. Not a tenant-filtered query by design; production CRUD endpoints in Sprint 4+ are filtered.
Sprint 5 feature 6: list custom property definitions for a parent_type. Workspace-scoped via middleware.
Sprint 5 feature 6: create a custom property definition.
Sprint 5 feature 6: delete a custom property definition. Cascades to strip key from objects.

Custom-properties UX: batch-read custom properties for many records (parent_type + ids) to power list-view columns without an N+1 fan-out. Workspace-scoped via Store schema; covered by TestMetadata_GetMany_BatchRead.
Sprint 5 feature 6: get custom properties for a contact.
Sprint 5 feature 6: set custom properties for a contact. Audit-logged fail-closed.
Sprint 5 feature 6: get custom properties for a deal.
Sprint 5 feature 6: set custom properties for a deal. Audit-logged fail-closed.

Integrator-gap tasket 20260601-110828-736b: one parameterised route for contacts|companies|deals. Commit import in one write transaction; emits import.committed audit event. Workspace-scoped, fail-closed.

endpoints.isolation_test: apps/api/internal/crm/connectors_integration_test.go::TestConnector_CrossTenantWorkspaceMismatchRejected (workspace-scoped via search_path; envelope.workspace must match the token-resolved workspace)
endpoints.rbac_test: Scope-gated, not role-gated: crm.RequireConnectorScope requires a service token with the connector.push_events scope. Unit: apps/api/internal/crm/connectors_test.go::TestAuthorizeConnector + TestRequireConnectorScope_*; integration: connectors_integration_test.go::TestConnector_WrongScopeForbidden
endpoints.notes: Sprint 9 / ADR-011: chatboting connector event ingestion. Service-token (connector actor) authenticated; idempotency_key dedupes at-least-once delivery; mutations attributed actor_type=connector, source_system={source}, audit-logged fail-closed.
